title: callitriche stagnalis var. vulgaris
intro: Callitriche stagnalis var. vulgaris, also known as bog stitchwort or marsh starwort, is a rare aquatic plant species that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Callitriche stagnalis var. vulgaris can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal purposes, although its uses and availability may be limited due to its rarity.
